svg.title: MedGuard AI — full system architecture
svg.desc: Two-layer pipeline: Bill Auditor layer feeding into AdvocAI appeal engine, with five agents and final output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the OCR pipeline for MedGuard AI')
sendPrompt('How does the CGHS rate card cross-check work in MedGuard AI?')
sendPrompt('How does anomaly detection work in the MedGuard AI bill auditor?')
sendPrompt('What does the Auditor agent do in AdvocAI?')
sendPrompt('What does the Clinician agent do — PubMed evidence retrieval?')
sendPrompt('How does the Regulatory agent handle IRDAI and Indian insurance law?')
sendPrompt('How does the Barrister agent draft the appeal letter?')
sendPrompt('What does the Judge agent validate in the appeal pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the final MedGuard AI output package contain?')
g.text: PDF appeal + savings estimate + evidence bundle
